signals.detail: This ticket directly fixes the instrumentation gap Atom detected — exceptions from the webapp are currently invisible. It has no PR activity and is not assigned. Risk of another sprint passing with blind error tracking.

signals.title: WFM1-1158 has no roadmap label and no PM requirements
signals.detail: WFM1-1158 was created and self-assigned by Joel de Leon with an empty description. No PM requirements written. The other 3 in-progress items (WFM1-1082, WFM1-935, WFM1-838) all have RoadMap2026 labels and PM-authored specs. Clarify what WFM1-1158 maps to.

signals.title: SSO login failures up 31% alongside MFA rollout
signals.detail: sso_login_failed rose from 133 to 174 this week while mfa_sms_setup_phone surged 135%. MFA adoption is accelerating but may be introducing edge-case failures. Cross-reference failure breakdown by error type — confirm MFA refactor (PAY-1093) is not causing regressions for specific country codes or device types.

signals.title: MFA shipping without regression test
signals.detail: PAY-1287 (MFA QA regression test) is Todo with no assignee. Three MFA feature tickets are In Progress and nearly done. Shipping MFA without a regression test is high risk — auth flow breakage affects all WSE logins. Assign PAY-1287 immediately.

signals.title: Henrique carrying MFA + Tokenization simultaneously
signals.detail: PAY-1088/1089/1090 (MFA) and PAY-1192/1193/1195 (Tokenization) are all assigned to henriquev and all Todo/In Progress. MFA needs to close before tokenization starts — these are competing auth surface changes.
